channel.title: Program Correctness / Code Comprehension :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Thread: Program Correctness / Code Comprehension Working draft for faculty review. A spiral deepens through escalating passes across blocks. This is the spiral; one of nine spirals (alongside three lenses and one bounded practice). In one line: From ‘make it work’ to ‘defend it under scrutiny’ — the lens changes each pass. Character Each pass shifts the lens rather than just raising difficulty: produce → understand others’ → organize for correctness → verify → defend.
